title.en: Crop and mask raster to analysis extent

description.en: Crops and masks an existing CORINE CLC raster to a given spatial analysis extent (e.g. a catchment or country boundary), returning only the raster cells within that geometry (R function 'get_raster_for_geometry')

inputFile1_corineCLC_rds.title: CORINE CLC raster
inputFile1_corineCLC_rds.description: Path to an .rds file containing the CORINE Land Cover raster (SpatRaster) to be cropped and masked.

inputFile2_analysisExtent_gpkg.title: Analysis spatial extent
inputFile2_analysisExtent_gpkg.description: Path to a GeoPackage file containing the spatial extent geometry (e.g. catchment or country boundary) to crop and mask the raster to.

corineCLC_cropped.title: Cropped and masked CORINE CLC raster
corineCLC_cropped.description: The CORINE CLC raster (SpatRaster), cropped and masked to the given spatial analysis extent.
